resources.name: Spotify Web API with fixes and improvements from sonallux
resources.description: You can use Spotify's Web API to discover music and podcasts, manage your Spotify library, control audio playback, and much more. Browse our available Web API endpoints using the sidebar at left, or via the navigation bar on top of this page on smaller screens. In order to make successful Web API requests your app will need a valid access token. One can be obtained through OAuth 2.0. The base URI for all Web API requests is `https://api.spotify.com/v1`. Need help? See our Web API guides for more information, or visit the Spotify for Developers community forum to ask questions and connect with other developers.

resources.name: get-an-album
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single album.

resources.name: get-multiple-albums
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple albums identified by their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-an-albums-tracks
resources.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about an album’s tracks.
Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of tracks returned.

resources.name: get-users-saved-albums
resources.description: Get a list of the albums saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: save-albums-user
resources.description: Save one or more albums to the current user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: remove-albums-user
resources.description: Remove one or more albums from the current user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: check-users-saved-albums
resources.description: Check if one or more albums is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: get-new-releases
resources.description: Get a list of new album releases featured in Spotify (shown, for example, on a Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

resources.name: get-an-artist
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single artist identified by their unique Spotify ID.

resources.name: get-multiple-artists
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several artists based on their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-an-artists-albums
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's albums.

resources.name: get-an-artists-top-tracks
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's top tracks by country.

resources.name: get-an-artists-related-artists
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information about artists similar to a given artist. Similarity is based on analysis of the Spotify community's listening history.

resources.name: get-an-audiobook
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single audiobook. Audiobooks are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-multiple-audiobooks
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several audiobooks identified by their Spotify IDs. Audiobooks are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-audiobook-chapters
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an audiobook's chapters. Audiobooks are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-users-saved-audiobooks
resources.description: Get a list of the audiobooks saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: save-audiobooks-user
resources.description: Save one or more audiobooks to the current Spotify user's library.

resources.name: remove-audiobooks-user
resources.description: Remove one or more audiobooks from the Spotify user's library.

resources.name: check-users-saved-audiobooks
resources.description: Check if one or more audiobooks are already saved in the current Spotify user's library.

resources.name: get-categories
resources.description: Get a list of categories used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

resources.name: get-a-category
resources.description: Get a single category used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).

resources.name: get-a-chapter
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for a single audiobook chapter. Chapters are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-several-chapters
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several audiobook chapters identified by their Spotify IDs. Chapters are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-an-episode
resources.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single episode identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

resources.name: get-multiple-episodes
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several episodes based on their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-users-saved-episodes
resources.description:
Get a list of the episodes saved in the current Spotify user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning. Please share any feedback that you have, or issues that you discover, in our [developer community forum](https://community.spotify.com/t5/Spotify-for-Developers/bd-p/Spotify_Developer).

resources.name: save-episodes-user
resources.description:
Save one or more episodes to the current user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning. Please share any feedback that you have, or issues that you discover, in our [developer community forum](https://community.spotify.com/t5/Spotify-for-Developers/bd-p/Spotify_Developer).

resources.name: remove-episodes-user
resources.description:
Remove one or more episodes from the current user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning. Please share any feedback that you have, or issues that you discover, in our [developer community forum](https://community.spotify.com/t5/Spotify-for-Developers/bd-p/Spotify_Developer).

resources.name: check-users-saved-episodes
resources.description:
Check if one or more episodes is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Episodes' library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning. Please share any feedback that you have, or issues that you discover, in our [developer community forum](https://community.spotify.com/t5/Spotify-for-Developers/bd-p/Spotify_Developer)..

resources.name: get-recommendation-genres
resources.description: Retrieve a list of available genres seed parameter values for [recommendations](/documentation/web-api/reference/get-recommendations).

resources.name: get-available-markets
resources.description: Get the list of markets where Spotify is available.

resources.name: get-information-about-the-users-current-playback
resources.description: Get information about the user’s current playback state, including track or episode, progress, and active device.

resources.name: transfer-a-users-playback
resources.description: Transfer playback to a new device and optionally begin playback. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: get-a-users-available-devices
resources.description: Get information about a user’s available Spotify Connect devices. Some device models are not supported and will not be listed in the API response.

resources.name: get-the-users-currently-playing-track
resources.description: Get the object currently being played on the user's Spotify account.

resources.name: start-a-users-playback
resources.description: Start a new context or resume current playback on the user's active device. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: pause-a-users-playback
resources.description: Pause playback on the user's account. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: skip-users-playback-to-next-track
resources.description: Skips to next track in the user’s queue. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: skip-users-playback-to-previous-track
resources.description: Skips to previous track in the user’s queue. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: seek-to-position-in-currently-playing-track
resources.description: Seeks to the given position in the user’s currently playing track. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: set-repeat-mode-on-users-playback
resources.description: Set the repeat mode for the user's playback. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: set-volume-for-users-playback
resources.description: Set the volume for the user’s current playback device. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: toggle-shuffle-for-users-playback
resources.description: Toggle shuffle on or off for user’s playback. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: get-recently-played
resources.description:
Get tracks from the current user's recently played tracks.
_**Note**: Currently doesn't support podcast episodes._

resources.name: get-queue
resources.description: Get the list of objects that make up the user's queue.

resources.name: add-to-queue
resources.description: Add an item to the end of the user's current playback queue. This API only works for users who have Spotify Premium. The order of execution is not guaranteed when you use this API with other Player API endpoints.

resources.name: get-playlist
resources.description: Get a playlist owned by a Spotify user.

resources.name: change-playlist-details
resources.description:
Change a playlist's name and public/private state. (The user must, of
course, own the playlist.)

resources.name: get-playlists-tracks
resources.description: Get full details of the items of a playlist owned by a Spotify user.

resources.name: add-tracks-to-playlist
resources.description: Add one or more items to a user's playlist.

resources.name: reorder-or-replace-playlists-tracks
resources.description:
Either reorder or replace items in a playlist depending on the request's parameters. To reorder items, include `range_start`, `insert_before`, `range_length` and `snapshot_id` in the request's body. To replace items, include `uris` as either a query parameter or in the request's body. Replacing items in a playlist will overwrite its existing items. This operation can be used for replacing or clearing items in a playlist.
**Note**: Replace and reorder are mutually exclusive operations which share the same endpoint, but have different parameters. These operations can't be applied together in a single request.

resources.name: remove-tracks-playlist
resources.description: Remove one or more items from a user's playlist.

resources.name: get-a-list-of-current-users-playlists
resources.description:
Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by the current Spotify
user.

resources.name: get-list-users-playlists
resources.description: Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by a Spotify user.

resources.name: create-playlist
resources.description:
Create a playlist for a Spotify user. (The playlist will be empty until
you [add tracks](/documentation/web-api/reference/add-tracks-to-playlist).)
Each user is generally limited to a maximum of 11000 playlists.

resources.name: get-featured-playlists
resources.description: Get a list of Spotify featured playlists (shown, for example, on a Spotify player's 'Browse' tab).

resources.name: get-a-categories-playlists
resources.description: Get a list of Spotify playlists tagged with a particular category.

resources.name: get-playlist-cover
resources.description: Get the current image associated with a specific playlist.

resources.name: upload-custom-playlist-cover
resources.description: Replace the image used to represent a specific playlist.

resources.name: search
resources.description:
Get Spotify catalog information about albums, artists, playlists, tracks, shows, episodes or audiobooks
that match a keyword string. Audiobooks are only available within the US, UK, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.

resources.name: get-a-show
resources.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single show identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

resources.name: get-multiple-shows
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for several shows based on their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-a-shows-episodes
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information about an show’s episodes. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of episodes returned.

resources.name: get-users-saved-shows
resources.description: Get a list of shows saved in the current Spotify user's library. Optional parameters can be used to limit the number of shows returned.

resources.name: save-shows-user
resources.description: Save one or more shows to current Spotify user's library.

resources.name: remove-shows-user
resources.description: Delete one or more shows from current Spotify user's library.

resources.name: check-users-saved-shows
resources.description: Check if one or more shows is already saved in the current Spotify user's library.

resources.name: get-track
resources.description:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single track identified by its
unique Spotify ID.

resources.name: get-several-tracks
resources.description: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-users-saved-tracks
resources.description: Get a list of the songs saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: save-tracks-user
resources.description: Save one or more tracks to the current user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: remove-tracks-user
resources.description: Remove one or more tracks from the current user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: check-users-saved-tracks
resources.description: Check if one or more tracks is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.

resources.name: get-several-audio-features
resources.description: Get audio features for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.

resources.name: get-audio-features
resources.description:
Get audio feature information for a single track identified by its unique
Spotify ID.

resources.name: get-audio-analysis
resources.description: Get a low-level audio analysis for a track in the Spotify catalog. The audio analysis describes the track’s structure and musical content, including rhythm, pitch, and timbre.

resources.name: get-recommendations
resources.description:
Recommendations are generated based on the available information for a given seed entity and matched against similar artists and tracks. If there is sufficient information about the provided seeds, a list of tracks will be returned together with pool size details.

For artists and tracks that are very new or obscure there might not be enough data to generate a list of tracks.

resources.name: get-current-users-profile
resources.description:
Get detailed profile information about the current user (including the
current user's username).

resources.name: get-users-profile
resources.description: Get public profile information about a Spotify user.

resources.name: follow-playlist
resources.description: Add the current user as a follower of a playlist.

resources.name: unfollow-playlist
resources.description: Remove the current user as a follower of a playlist.

resources.name: get-followed
resources.description: Get the current user's followed artists.

resources.name: follow-artists-users
resources.description: Add the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.

resources.name: unfollow-artists-users
resources.description: Remove the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.

resources.name: check-current-user-follows
resources.description: Check to see if the current user is following one or more artists or other Spotify users.

resources.name: check-if-user-follows-playlist
resources.description: Check to see if one or more Spotify users are following a specified playlist.

resources.name: get-users-top-artists
resources.description: Get the current user's top artists based on calculated affinity.

resources.name: get-users-top-tracks
resources.description: Get the current user's top tracks based on calculated affinity.
